zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hardreshull於1291年出生在英國瓦維其可爾哈斯爾時，他的父親William de Hardreshull23歲，母親Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache29歲。他於1311年與Margaret Stafford在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾薩利比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年5月在英國諾薩普頓史爾艾希頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾希頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hardreshull于1291年出生在英国瓦維其可爾哈斯爾时，他的父亲William de Hardreshull23岁，母亲Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache29岁。他于1311年与Margaret Stafford在英国英格兰林可爾史爾薩利比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年5月在英国諾薩普頓史爾艾希頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾艾希頓。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hardreshull was born in 1291, in Hartshill, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de Hardreshull, was 23 and his mother, Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, was 29. He married Margaret Stafford in 1311, in Saleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in May 1368, in Ashton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Ashton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hardreshull est né en 1291, à Hartshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Hardreshull, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stafford en 1311, à Saleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1368, à Ashton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Ashton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hardreshull 1291 in Hartshill, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Hardreshull 23 und seine Mutter Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache 29. Er hat 1311 in Saleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1368 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Ashton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Ashton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hardreshull è nato il nel 1291 nel Hartshill, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William de Hardreshull, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stafford nel 1311, nel Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1368, nel Ashton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hardreshullが1291年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハートシュイルで生まれた時，父William de Hardreshullは23歳，母Juliana de Beauchamp de Hacheは29歳であった。1311年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアサレビーでMargaret Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年5月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアシュトンで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアシュトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hardreshull(이)가 1291년 영국 워윅실르 하츠힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hardreshull(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1311년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 살일비에서 Margaret Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 5월 영국 노르섬프토실르 애슈턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 애슈턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hardreshull nasceu em 1291, em Hartshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Hardreshull, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stafford em 1311, em Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1368, em Ashton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hardreshull родился в 1291 г. в местности харцхилл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Hardreshull было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stafford в 1311 г. в местности сеилеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер май 1368 г. в местности аштон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности аштон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hardreshull nació en 1291, en Hartshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Hardreshull, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Juliana de Beauchamp de Hache, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Stafford en 1311, en Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1368, en Ashton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Ashton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
